Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class UniversalFootnote

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.UniversalFootnote
public class UniversalFootnote extends Object
UniversalFootnote

Universal footnote combining valuation descriptor, source, and method information.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static UniversalFootnote of(String value)
      Returns a UniversalFootnote with the given value. For a specific value the returned object will always be a singleton so reference equality is satisfied when the values are the same.
      Parameters:
      value - value to be wrapped as UniversalFootnote
